execution_precedence.reason: foundation_pack_required_before_ingestion.required=true prohibits ingestion, tagging, or cataloging compiler work until the foundation pack exists and validates.
execution_precedence.operator_rule: No freeform coding, ingestion, tagging, or normalization work may begin before Step 2 passes. After Step 2 passes, execute Step 1 baseline ingestion, then continue strictly sequentially with explicit approval between mutation or ratification steps.

claim_boundary: This note does not change the governing packet. It resolves execution order only so the packet can be applied without violating its own foundation-pack gate.
